reviews.base_leadership: dark lord backport (~1.0): leadership base stat
reviews.total_leadership_requirement: dark lord backport: leadership item requirement
reviews.scepter_rise: dark lord backport: scepter rise item stat
reviews.final_damage_bonus: ancient set option target (ancient sets pending decision 5)
reviews.skill_damage_bonus: ancient set option target (pending decision 5); other sources are post-S3
reviews.critical_damage_bonus: fed by DL critical-damage-increase skill backport and ancient sets
reviews.is_scepter_equipped: dark lord backport: scepter equip flag
reviews.combo_bonus: OpenMU ships the DK combo formula in its 075 dataset; historically combo arrived ~0.98-1.0
reviews.is_skill_combo_available: dk combo backport (~0.98-1.0); unlocked by the hero-status quest
reviews.gain_hero_status_quest_completed: 1.0-era hero-status quest reward flag; legacy quests deferred
reviews.soul_barrier_receive_decrement: soul barrier backport (1.0-era soul master skill)
reviews.soul_barrier_mana_toll_per_hit: soul barrier backport (1.0-era soul master skill)
reviews.bonus_damage_with_scepter: dark lord backport: scepter damage bonus (non-MST part)
reviews.is_stunned: stun state; pre-S3 source is the earthshake backport, OpenMU wires stun only in S6
reviews.ice_damage_bonus: ancient jewelry damage bonus (S1-era jewelry, pending decision 5)
reviews.fire_damage_bonus: ancient jewelry damage bonus (S1-era jewelry, pending decision 5)
reviews.water_damage_bonus: ancient jewelry damage bonus (S1-era jewelry, pending decision 5)
reviews.earth_damage_bonus: ancient jewelry damage bonus (S1-era jewelry, pending decision 5)
reviews.wind_damage_bonus: ancient jewelry damage bonus (S1-era jewelry, pending decision 5)
reviews.poison_damage_bonus: ancient jewelry damage bonus (S1-era jewelry, pending decision 5)
reviews.lightning_damage_bonus: ancient jewelry damage bonus (S1-era jewelry, pending decision 5)
reviews.mana_recovery_absolute: engine regeneration term (current += mult*max + absolute); no pre-S3 data feeds it
reviews.health_recovery_absolute: engine regeneration term (current += mult*max + absolute); no pre-S3 data feeds it
reviews.defense_ignore_chance: ancient set option target (pending decision 5); also fed by the backported 2nd-wing option
reviews.double_damage_chance: ancient set option target (pending decision 5); other source is sockets
reviews.stun_chance: stun chance; pre-S3 source is the earthshake backport, OpenMU wires stun only in S6
reviews.is_underwater: spec section 11 atlans power-up; OpenMU applies underwater state at runtime only
reviews.is_invisible: engine-state flag (GM hide); not wired by pre-S3 data
reviews.total_energy_minus_15: dark lord backport (~1.0): mana formula intermediate

gaps.ability_after_monster_kill_absolute: after-kill regeneration slot wired by no dataset (dead data)
gaps.ability_after_monster_kill_multiplier: after-kill regeneration slot wired by no dataset (dead data)
gaps.bonus_experience_rate: fed only by S6 transformation rings/pets; exp rate knobs live in game_constants
gaps.damage_receive_horse_decrement: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir); DL class backport drops horse relationships
gaps.fenrir_base_dmg: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir)
gaps.final_damage_increase_pvp: wired only by guardian/380 options (post-S3), not by 2nd wings
gaps.health_after_monster_kill_absolute: after-kill regeneration slot wired by no dataset (dead data)
gaps.health_loss_after_hit: wing HP toll; wired by no OpenMU initializer (dead data)
gaps.horse_level: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir)
gaps.is_horse_equipped: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir); DL class backport drops horse relationships
gaps.is_mace_equipped: per-weapon-class flag set only by S6 weapon data (feeds MST buckets)
gaps.is_spear_equipped: per-weapon-class flag set only by S6 weapon data (feeds MST buckets)
gaps.is_two_handed_sword_equipped: per-weapon-class flag set only by S6 weapon data (feeds MST buckets)
gaps.mana_after_monster_kill_absolute: after-kill regeneration slot wired by no dataset (dead data)
gaps.mana_usage_reduction: wired only by S6 skill settings
gaps.nearby_party_member_count: wired only by S6 skill settings
gaps.pet_duration_increase: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir) (DL const value dropped)
gaps.raven_attack_damage_increase: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir)
gaps.raven_attack_rate: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir)
gaps.raven_attack_speed: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir)
gaps.raven_critical_damage_chance: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir)
gaps.raven_exc_damage_chance: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir)
gaps.raven_level: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir)
gaps.raven_maximum_damage: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir)
gaps.raven_minimum_damage: trainable pets excluded wholesale (dark raven/horse, fenrir)
gaps.shield_item_defense_increase: water socket option (S4); classes agent must drop the common relationship that reads it
gaps.skill_extra_mana_cost: infinite arrow effect (S2+ muse elf), not in curated backports
gaps.skill_level: master-skill level attribute; skills do not level pre-S3
